channel.title: Keelmark – Products
channel.description: Recent content in Products on Keelmark

item.title: Dosewise
item.description:
Dosewise

Medication timing and dose logging for Android.

Dosewise helps you record medication doses, check when the next dose is due, and keep a clear dose history.

What it is for

Medication can become so familiar that it is easy to forget whether you have just taken a dose. Dosewise is built around that very ordinary problem.

The app is intended to help with routine tracking: what was taken, when it was taken, and what the timing rules say about the next dose.

Dosewise is not medical advice and does not decide what medication you should take. Medication instructions should come from your clinician, pharmacist, or the medicine label.

Core features

Dose recording

Record when a medication was taken and keep a history of previous doses.

Timing checks

See whether enough time has passed before the next dose.

Medication setup

Add medications with dose rules, daily limits, and schedule details.

Weekly routines

Support for medicines taken on selected days rather than only daily intervals.

Readable history

A clear record helps answer the question: what happened today?

Local first

Designed to work without an unnecessary account. Add cloud features only if they earn their keep.

Availability

Dosewise is being prepared for Android. Replace this section with the live Google Play link when the listing is ready.
